oneLineDescription: Evaluate ANZ market entry for an AI-first dental practice management add-on
goal: Validate hypothesis and produce a go/no-go recommendation by 2026-02-28 based on 15+ discovery calls and a design-partner LOI
scope: Mid-sized independent ANZ dental practices (2-8 chairs). Add-on, not full PMS replacement.
outOfScope: DSO/corporate dental chains, solo practices, specialist-only clinics (orthodontic/endodontic), outside ANZ.
strategicHypothesis: Mid-sized independent ANZ dental practices (2-8 chairs) will pay $600-$1,200/mo for an AI-first practice management add-on that automates recall and billing, because existing PMSs have a 10-year UX gap and dentists want to stop fighting their software.
icpDescription: Independent dental practice, 2-8 chairs, in ANZ metro or regional centre. Currently using Dentrix, Oasis, Praktika, or D4W. Practice principal or practice manager makes software decisions. Annual revenue $1M-$6M AUD. Pain: manual recall workflow, billing/claim friction with Medicare/private health.
killConditions: Fewer than 4 of 10 discovery practices rank recall automation in their top-3 pains
No willingness-to-pay signal above $800/mo after 10 discovery calls
TAM estimate falls below $50M AUD ARR
Unable to secure 2 design-partner LOIs within 6 weeks
